clauses.text: Access to and usage of the Platform is strictly limited to individuals or entities capable of forming legally binding contracts under applicable law. Parties deemed Incompetent to contract, including but not limited to minors, un-discharged insolvents, or any other category specified by law, are not eligible to use the Platform.

If the Partner is a business entity, it must be duly registered and in good standing under the laws of its country of incorporation or registration and have the requisite power and authority to conduct the business it is currently involved in.

If You are registering as a business entity, you affirm that You have been duly authorized by the business entity to accept and enter into this Agreement and that You have the authority to bind the business entity to these terms.
In connection with Your registration and use of the Platform, you agree to furbish accurate, current, and complete details as may be required for Partner registration.

This includes but is not limited to Registered full legal name, complete address, contact details, GSTIN, PAN, Business PAN, Pin code, registered address of the business, Communication address, Bank account details, trade names, pricing details of each venue or services and/or details.

You affirm that all the information provided to the Platform is accurate, current, complete, and in accordance with this Agreement. If any information provided is found or suspected to be untrue, inaccurate, outdated, incomplete, or not in accordance with this Agreement, we reserve the right to indefinitely suspend, terminate or block access to Your account on the Platform without prior notice.

It is Your responsibility to keep Your account information up to date. You agree to promptly update all account information to keep it accurate, current, and complete. Any changes that may materially impact Your transactions on the Platform should be immediately notified to us.

The Service will be available to You subject to this Agreement and the applicable order(s). venuebook.in will use commercially reasonable efforts to make the Service available 24 hours a day and 7 days a week, except during the planned downtime with advance notice to You or the occurrence of a Force Majeure Event.

The Partner agrees that its use of the Platform is not contingent on the delivery of any future functionality or features, or dependent on any oral or written public comments by venuebook.in regarding future functionality or features.

venuebook.in reserves the right to modify the features and functionality of the Services during the term of the Agreement. In case, if there is a deprecation of any material functionality, venuebook.in will provide an advance notice of 30 (thirty) working days to You.
The provision and use of venuebook.in in certain jurisdictions are subject to its Region-Specific Terms.
We might provide some or all elements of the Agreement Service through third-party service providers.
If You purchase any additional services or packages from Us, this Agreement will apply to all additional orders and features that you activate within Your venuebook.in account.

You agree not to use the venuebook.in or Services for any unlawful purpose or any purpose prohibited under this clause. You agree not to use the venuebook.in or Services in any way that could damage the venuebook.in, Services or general business of the Provider.
The Partner can only list and sell the following Services on this Platform: Online Booking of Venues & Additional services related to the venues

The Partner is restricted from listing or selling the following Services: Any service that is not listed on the portal unless otherwise communicated to venuebook.in or in case, if there is a deprecation of any material functionality.
You further agree not to use the venuebook.in or Services:
Engaging in any activity that could result in excessive bandwidth usage, degradation of performance, or disruption of venuebook.in.
to use for competitive benchmarking or for developing a competing Services;
To harass, abuse, or threaten others or otherwise violate any person's legal rights;
To violate any intellectual property rights of the Provider or any third party;
To upload or otherwise disseminate any computer viruses or other software that may damage the property of another;
To perpetrate any fraud;
To engage in or create any unlawful gambling, sweepstakes, or pyramid scheme;
To publish or distribute any obscene or defamatory material;
To publish or distribute any material that incites violence, hate or discrimination towards any group;
To unlawfully gather information about others.

You are prohibited from using venuebook.in or its content: (a) for any unlawful purpose; (b) to solicit others to perform or participate in any unlawful acts; (c) to infringe on any third party's intellectual property or proprietary rights, or rights of publicity or privacy, whether knowingly or unknowingly; (d) to violate any local, federal or international law, statute, ordinance or regulation; (e) to harass, abuse, insult, harm, defame, slander, disparage, intimidate, or discriminate based on gender, sexual orientation, religion, ethnicity, race, age, national origin, or disability; (f) to submit false or misleading information or any content which is defamatory, libelous, threatening, unlawful, harassing, indecent, abusive, obscene, or lewd and lascivious or pornographic, or exploits minors in any way or assists in human trafficking or content that would violate rights of publicity and/or privacy or that would violate any law; (g) to upload or transmit viruses or any other type of malicious code that will or may be used in any way that will affect the functionality or operation of the venuebook.in, other Services, or the Internet; (h) to collect or track the personal information of others; (i) to damage, disable, overburden, or impair the venuebook.in or any other party's use of the venuebook.in; (j) to spam, phish, pharm, pretext, spider, crawl, or scrape; (k) for any obscene or immoral purpose; or (l) to interfere with or circumvent the security features of the venuebook.in, other Services, or the Internet. We reserve the right to terminate Your use of venuebook.in for violating any of the prohibited uses.

You acknowledge that venuebook.in is not responsible or liable and does not control the content of any information that may be posted or stored on venuebook.in by You or other users of venuebook.in and You are solely responsible for the same. You agree that You shall not upload, post, or transmit any content that You do not have a right to make available (such as the intellectual property of another party).

You agree to comply with all applicable laws, statutes and regulations concerning Your use of venuebook.in and further agree that You will not transmit any information, data, text, files, links, software, chats, communication or other materials that are abusive, invasive of another's privacy, harassing, defamatory, vulgar, obscene, unlawful, false, misleading, harmful, threatening, hateful or racially or otherwise objectionable, including without limitation material of any kind or nature that encourages conduct that could constitute a criminal offence, give rise to civil liability or otherwise violate any applicable local, state, provincial, national, or international law or regulation, or encourage the use of controlled substances.
You may not use the Platform for any illegal or unauthorized purpose nor may You, in the use of the Service, violate any laws in Your jurisdiction (including but not limited to copyright laws).
You shall obtain all necessary consents and permissions from individuals whose personal data is collected or processed through venuebook.in.
venuebook.in reserves the right to monitor the Partner's use of venuebook.in to ensure compliance with these terms and applicable laws.

In the event of suspected violation of these terms, applicable laws, and regulations, we investigate and take appropriate actions, including but not limited to warning the Partner, suspending, or terminating the Partner's access to the venuebook.in, and reporting any illegal activities to the relevant authorities.
Below table indicates the service fees and subscription amount that venuebook.in would be charging to the vendor.

rows.label: venuebook.in charges service fees based on base price of venue

clauses.text: venuebook.in reserves the right to revise the Commercial Model with prior notice to the Partner. Continued use of the venuebook.in platform after such notice will be considered acceptance of the revised terms, unless the Partner chooses to terminate the Agreement by providing notice.
Invoicing & Billing Procedure

Authorization: The Partner expressly authorizes venuebook.in to apply a self-billing procedure. venuebook.in will issue, in the Partner's name and on its behalf, all invoices relating to the venue bookings (the Invoice). The Partner agrees not to issue separate invoices for services covered under this Agreement to avoid duplication.

Partner Responsibility: The Partner remains responsible for the accuracy of the Invoice data (e.g., GSTIN, PAN). The Partner must immediately notify venuebook.in if: (i) Self-billing is not permitted under their specific tax status. (ii) There are changes to GST registration or business status.

Service Charge Invoicing: venuebook.in will issue its own invoice to the Partner for the {{recurring_payment}} Subscription Fees of Rs. {{price}} during the time of billing via email and service fees (i.e. 5% or 4% or 3% based on booking value) during the transfer of money from payment gateway wallet to vendors bank account. You would be able to see the invoice details of Subscription billing and Settlement payout in the dashboard.
Settlement.
Settlement Window: All funds received from customers will be held by venuebook.in for a period of 7 days prior to vendor payout.

Purpose of Holding Period: This duration is strictly maintained to ensure a smooth user experience, allowing for immediate refund disbursement should a customer cancel their booking within the permitted window.

Payout Execution: Upon the conclusion of the 7-day holding period, venuebook.in will initiate the transfer of the booking value (less applicable service fees and taxes) directly to the Partner's registered bank account.
Acceptance: If the Partner does not notify venuebook.in of any discrepancies within three (3) Business Days of receiving the monthly summary or settlement report, the records will be deemed accepted.
Service Charges & Records Evidence

Conclusive Evidence: The records, logs, and dashboard data within the venuebook.in Backend Management Suite shall be the primary and conclusive evidence for calculating Service Charges (Subscription + Service fees).

Dispute Period: Any challenge to the calculation of Service fees or fees must be submitted via the Partner Dashboard within three (3) Business Days of the settlement notification. In the absence of such evidence, the system-generated figures are final.

Taxes (GST): Each party shall be responsible for the payment of any and all taxes, including Goods and Services Tax (GST), as may be levied by the Applicable Law. The Partner shall be responsible for reporting and paying any applicable GST in relation to the services provided under this Agreement. The Partner shall ensure that the Service Charges invoice issued to venuebook.in correctly includes the applicable GST amount, if any, as per the provisions of the Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017. The parties acknowledge and agree that no additional amounts shall be payable by either party in respect of any tax liability beyond what is specified in this Agreement. In the event that any amounts are payable by venuebook.in to the Partner, such amounts shall be inclusive of all taxes, including GST, as applicable. The Partner agrees that the GST, if applicable, shall be calculated based on the amounts payable by venuebook.in (and not in addition to), at the rate prevailing at the relevant tax point under Indian law.

Tax Deduction at Source (TDS): (i) venuebook.in shall deduct TDS at the applicable rate, as per the provisions of the Income Tax Act, 1961, from any payments made under this Agreement. (ii) The Partner must provide all necessary documents, including the PAN (Permanent Account Number), for proper deduction. (iii) venuebook.in will issue a TDS certificate (Form 16A) to the Partner reflecting the TDS deducted during the relevant financial year. (iv) Any taxes payable by the Partner regarding income received under this Agreement remain their sole responsibility.

Tax Collection at Source (TCS): (i) As an e-commerce operator, venuebook.in shall collect TCS at the applicable rate on the net value of taxable supplies, as per Section 52 of the CGST Act, 2017. (ii) The Partner must provide their GSTIN (GST Identification Number) to ensure the collected TCS is correctly credited to their electronic cash ledger. (iii) venuebook.in will file the required returns (GSTR-8) and provide the Partner with the necessary details to claim the TCS credit. (iv) Compliance with GST filing and the payment of any balance GST liability remains the exclusive responsibility of the Partner.

All commercial and contractual terms, which include but are not limited to price, shipping costs, payment methods and terms, delivery dates, periods, and modes, and Services warranties and after-sale services, are exclusively offered by the Partner and agreed upon between the Partner and Customers. The Platform does not have any control, influence, or involvement in these commercial or contractual terms.

The Platform does not make any representations or warranties regarding specifics, such as quality, value, and saleability of the Services proposed to be sold or purchased on the Platform. The Platform does not implicitly or explicitly endorse the sale or purchase of any Services.

The Platform does not accept any liability for any errors or omissions made by third parties in relation to the Services offered on the Platform. It is also not responsible for any non-performance or breach of contract between the Partner or Customers.

The Platform cannot and does not guarantee that the Partner and Customers will perform any transactions concluded on the Platform and is not required to mediate or resolve any disputes or disagreements between the Partner and Customers.

The Platform is not liable for any inaccuracies, commissions, errors, or misrepresentations made by Partners, Customers, or third parties in relation to the Services offered on the Platform. Additionally, the Platform holds no responsibility for any non-performance, delays, or breach of any contract agreed upon between the Partners and Customers.
At no point during a transaction does the Platform acquire, hold, or claim any ownership rights over the Services sold by the Partner.

As a registered Partner, you have the right to list services on our Platform, adhering to the policies included within this Agreement and any other updated policies published on this Platform or communicated to You. You must have legal authorization to sell all listed services and possess all requisite licenses and permits necessary for the sale.

It is crucial that the services you list for sale do not violate any third-party intellectual property rights, trade secrets, proprietary rights, publicity rights, or privacy rights. You bear the responsibility for ensuring this compliance.

Your listings should include accurate text descriptions, graphics, pictures, or videos that genuinely represent that service for sale. Each service must be listed in an appropriate category on the Platform, and You must ensure they are always available for successful sale completion.

The listed description must accurately reflect the actual conditions of the Services. If there is a discrepancy between the service description and the actual condition, you are obligated to refund any payment received from the Customer.

You are prohibited from listing a specific Services in multiple quantities across various categories on the Platform. The Platform reserves the right to delete such multiple lists and may restrict the sale of Services originating from certain countries or regions.

If the same Services are sold by multiple Partners through various or similar Services page views, the Platform reserves the right to aggregate and present the best Services data to enhance the Customer experience.

The Partner agrees and acknowledges that they are solely responsible for determining the price of the venue & its services listed on the Platform. The Partner must ensure that all pricing information is accurate and includes all applicable taxes, charges, and fees. The Partner shall also be responsible for promptly updating the prices of the venue & its services in the event of any changes.
Partners are prohibited from artificially inflating prices or participating in price gouging practices.
Partner may run promotional pricing or discount campaign only after obtaining prior approval from the Platform.

If certain Services are unavailable or out of stock, the Partner shall take immediate steps to either remove the Services listing from the Platform or clearly mark the Services as out of stock. Any failure on Partner's part to manage inventory efficiently, resulting in order cancellations due to non-availability of Services, may lead to penalties, customer disputes, or termination of this Agreement.

Apart from the above, the following pricing and inventory policies are applicable: Partners are allowed to price their Add-ons at their discretion & deem to withdraw any addons but have to provide their services to customers who have the addons included in their booking prior to withdrawal.

In the event that a Vendor cancels a confirmed booking (due to maintenance, double-booking, or emergencies) the Customer is entitled to a 100% refund of the booking amount. All cancellation requests must be initiated through the My Bookings section on venuebook.in or by emailing Support.
venuebook.in will collect and retain the security deposit provided by the customer at the time of booking. This deposit will be returned to the customer by the platform after the event has concluded.

The Partner acknowledges that customers purchasing Services from the Partner through the Platform may be asked to leave reviews and ratings regarding their purchase. These reviews and ratings may be made publicly available on the platform and can be viewed by all users of the Platform.

The Partner acknowledges that they have no right to interfere with, manipulate or remove these reviews and ratings. Any attempt by the Partner to manipulate reviews or ratings will result in the immediate termination of this Agreement.

Partners are not permitted to review their own Services or the Services of competitors. The Platform reserves the right to suspend or terminate the Partner's account if fraudulent or deceptive review practices are detected.
Partner acknowledges that repeated low ratings or negative reviews may lead to account suspension or termination.
You must keep all Your credentials including username and password highly confidential.
You are responsible for maintaining the safety and security of Your identifying information as well as keeping Us apprised of any changes to Your identifying information.
In case, if Your credentials are compromised, you agree to notify Us immediately in writing.

The billing information You provide Us, including credit/debit card, billing address and other payment information, is subject to the same confidentiality and accuracy requirements as the rest of Your identifying information. Providing false or inaccurate information or using venuebook.in or Services to further fraud or unlawful activity is grounds for immediate termination of Your Agreement and Account.

Partner is responsible for compliance with the provisions of this Agreement by Agents and Customers and for any and all activities that occur under an Account. Without foregoing, Partner will ensure that its use of the Services is in compliance with all applicable laws, regulations, privacy notices, Agreements, and other obligations with the Agents and Customers.
The Partner shall comply with all applicable data protection and privacy laws and regulations when processing and handling any personal data through venuebook.in.
The Partner agrees to cooperate with venuebook.in in resolving any technical issues or addressing any support requests related to the portal.
The Partner is responsible for ensuring full compliance with the provisions of IGST, CGST, UTGST, and/or SGST regarding the goods or services You provide.
Partners are obliged to comply with any additional policies and procedures established by the Platform in relation to sales, deliveries, and returns.

Under the Agreement with Us, we offer a limited, non-transferable license to the Partner that is non-sublicensable and non-assignable, a white label solution allowing brand name and/or logo of the Partner on documents related to transactions that take place on our Platform.

The Platform will endeavour to use reasonable security measures to protect against unauthorized access to the platform and to Partner's data. This includes maintaining proper firewalls and protection systems.
The Platform will provide reasonable technical support to the Partner as it relates to using the Platform for the sale of goods and/or services.

The Platform agrees to provide the Partner with periodic sales reports showing the number of units of each Services sold, total sales, and any returns or refunds processed during the reporting period.
The Platform will provide basic customer service to the Customers, including assistance with navigating the Platform, making purchases, and addressing non-Partner-specific issues.
The Platform will make reasonable efforts to limit downtime and ensure that Platform is available for use by Partners and Customers.
The Platform is responsible for ensuring that it complies with all applicable laws, regulations, and standards in the operation of the e-commerce Platform.
The Partner acknowledges and undertakes to comply with all applicable laws and agrees to sign the declarations detailed in this Agreement.

If required under the law, the Partner must provide a hallmark certificate, and customer KYC according to anti-money laundering laws and other laws. The Platform disclaims any responsibility for conducting Customer KYC.
The Partner ensures that no services originate wholly or partially from any country listed under any national or international sanctions.
The Partner agrees to comply with all applicable data protection laws.
The Partner warrants that it has not and will not engage in any form of bribery or corruption in connection with its performance under this Agreement.

The term of Service begins when the Partner sign-up for using venuebook.in and will remain in effect as long as the Partner uses venuebook.in, or statement of work, or until this Agreement is otherwise terminated in accordance with the terms hereof, whichever occurs first.

If You have selected for recurring Subscription scheme, upon the expiry of an existing plan, an amount equivalent to the Subscription Service Fee will be deducted automatically. If it fails, you shall make the payment within 30 (thirty) calendar days from the due date, failing to do so, Your Agreement will be suspended or terminated.

The Platform may terminate an Account by providing notice of 15 (fifteen) calendar days to the Partner. To cancel the Agreement, the Partner can do the following: Send an email to info@venuebook.in with the request. In the meanwhile, the service can be terminated from the Billing Section under the Profile Page.

Upon receiving an account closure from you, the concerned account will be placed on hold for a duration of 7 (seven) calendar days. This pause ensures the completion of all prior transactions made before the closure request.
During these 7 (seven) calendar days hold period, the Partner will have access to their account for the purpose of downloading payment and taxation reports as necessary.
Once the hold period is over, the Partner is required to contact us, confirming that they have downloaded the necessary reports and confirm the deactivation of the account.
Upon receipt of the above confirmation and provided there are no outstanding payments due from the Partner, the Partner's account will be deactivated.

Post-deactivation, certain information, including registered mobile number, GSTIN, email id, and other transaction-related information will be retained for audit purposes and as per the applicable laws.

The Provider specifically reserves the right to terminate this Agreement if You violate any of the terms outlined herein, including, but not limited to, violating the intellectual property rights of the Provider or a third party, failing to comply with applicable laws or other legal obligations, and/or publishing or distributing illegal material.

Either Party can terminate this Agreement if the other Party commits a material breach of these terms, other Agreements, or applicable laws not cured for more than 15 (fifteen) calendar days, if the other Party becomes subject to a petition in bankruptcy, or any other proceedings relating to insolvency, liquidation, or assignment for the benefit of creditors. In case the Partner terminates the Agreement, in accordance with this clause, the Partner will be entitled to a refund of any prepaid Service Fees covering the remainder of the Agreement term. In case, if the Agreement is terminated by venuebook.in in accordance with this clause, the Partner must pay any unpaid Service Fees covering the remainder of the Agreement Term.

At the termination of this Agreement, any provisions that would be expected to survive termination by their nature shall remain in full force and effect. You will be subject to this Agreement for as long as You have access to venuebook.in.

In case of a paid Partner, upon Partner's written request, venuebook.in will make Service Data available to Partner for export or download for 10 (ten) calendar days after the Effective Date of termination, expiration or migration of the Account, except for Service Data deleted in accordance with these terms, or upon violation of applicable laws, or is against the law or legal order. Thereafter, the venuebook.in will have no obligation to retain the Service Data unless otherwise stated under applicable laws.

In order to serve You better and communicate Service updates and security reasons, it is imminent to communicate with You constantly. Therefore, by using the Service, you consent to receive communications via phone or electronic records from the venuebook.in including e-mail messages telling You about products and services offered by venuebook.in (or its affiliates and partners) and understanding Your requirements. Communication can also be by posting any notices on venuebook.in.
You agree that the communications sent to You by venuebook.in shall not be construed as spam or bulk under any law prevailing in any country where such communication is received.
Each party shall promptly notify the other party in writing of any change in its contact information to ensure effective communication under this Agreement.

The Provider may collect and process personal information and other data from the Partner and its Agents, and Customers as necessary for the provision of providing the Service. The Provider's privacy policy shall govern the collection and processing of such data. The Partner is responsible for reviewing the privacy policy periodically to stay informed of any changes. You can access the privacy policy through the following link: www.venuebook.in/privacy-policy
The Partner acknowledges that the use of venuebook.in carries certain inherent risks and uncertainties including:
Technical risks such as interruptions, delays, or unavailability of venuebook.in due to hardware, software, or network failures.

Security risks, such as unauthorized access, data breaches, or loss of data.

By using venuebook.in, the Partner voluntarily accepts and assumes all risks associated with its use. The Partner acknowledges that the Provider shall not be held liable for any damages, losses, or harm arising from or related to the inherent risks of venuebook.in.

venuebook.in and Services are provided for communication purposes only. You acknowledge and agree that any information posted on venuebook.in is not intended to be legal advice, medical advice, or financial advice, and no fiduciary relationship has been created between You and the Provider.

The Provider claims no further proprietary rights in Your Content.

If You come to know about any of Your intellectual property rights have been infringed or otherwise violated by the posting of information or media by another of Our Partners, please contact Us and let Us know.

In the event that the Partner becomes aware of any infringement or unauthorized use of the Provider IP, the Partner shall promptly notify the Provider and provide all necessary assistance to protect the Provider's rights in the Provider IP.

The Partner grants the Provider the right to use the Partner's name, logo, and general description of the nature of the service provided in connection with this Agreement for the purpose of identifying the Partner as a customer of the Provider. The Provider may include the Partner's name and logo on its website, marketing and promotional materials.

Whenever the Partner requests to make reasonable changes or restrictions on the use of its name and logo, the Provider shall make a commercially reasonable effort to accommodate such requests. Neither party shall make any public statement or press release regarding this Agreement without the prior written consent of the other party, except as required by applicable law or regulation.

venuebook.in will indemnify and defend the Partner from and against any claim brought by a third party against the Partner alleging Partner's use of Service infringes third-party valid intellectual property rights (IP Claim). venuebook.in shall, at venuebook.in's expense defend such IP claim and pay damages finally awarded against Partner in connection therewith, provided Partner promptly notify venuebook.in of a threat or notice of IP Claim, venuebook.in reserve the exclusive right to defend such claims, Partner full cooperates with venuebook.in in connection therewith.

Partner agrees to defend and indemnify the Provider and any of its affiliates (if applicable) and hold Us harmless against any and all legal claims and demands, including reasonable attorney's Fees, which may arise from or relate to Your use or misuse of the venuebook.in or Services, Your breach of this Agreement, or Your conduct or actions. venuebook.in will immediately notify the Partner of the threat or notice of such a claim. venuebook.in will cooperate with Partner in connection with such disputes. You agree that the Provider shall be able to select its own legal counsel and may participate in its own defense if the Provider wishes.

venuebook.in may contain links to third-party websites, apps, and resources. If the Partner does not agree with any proposed modifications to this Agreement, the Partner may terminate this Agreement in accordance with the Term and Termination clause herein.

To the extent any part or sub-part of this Agreement is held ineffective or invalid by any court of law, you agree that the prior, effective version of this Agreement shall be considered enforceable and valid to the fullest extent.

You agree to routinely monitor this Agreement and refer to the Effective Data posted at the top of this Agreement to note modifications or variations. You further agree to clear Your cache when doing so to avoid accessing a prior version of this Agreement. You agree that your continued use of the venuebook.in after any modifications to this Agreement is a manifestation of Your continued assent to this Agreement.

In the event that You fail to monitor any modifications to or variations of this Agreement, you agree that such failure shall be considered an affirmative waiver of Your right to review the modified Agreement.

This Agreement constitutes the entire understanding between the Parties with respect to any and all use of venuebook.in. This Agreement supersedes and replaces all prior or contemporaneous Agreements or understandings, written or oral, regarding the use of this venuebook.in.

venuebook.in disclaims all warranties, expressed, or implied including, without limitation, all implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, title and non-infringement or arising from a course of dealing usage, or trade practice.

venuebook.in makes no warranty that the use of the venuebook.in will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, without defect or error-free. You expressly agree that use of venuebook.in is at Your own risk. venuebook.in shall not be responsible for any content found on the venuebook.in.

Your use of any information or materials on this venuebook.in or otherwise obtained through the use of venuebook.in is entirely at Your own risk, for which we shall not be liable. It shall be Your own responsibility to ensure that any services or information available through venuebook.in meet Your specific requirements.

venuebook.in assumes no responsibility for the accuracy, currency, completeness or usefulness of information, views, opinions, or advice in any material contained in venuebook.in. Any information from third parties or advertisers is made available without making any changes and so venuebook.in cannot guarantee accuracy and is not liable for any inconsistencies arising thereof.

All postings, messages, advertisements, photos, sounds, images, text, files, video, or other materials posted on, transmitted through, or linked from venuebook.in, are solely the responsibility of the person from whom such Content originated, and the venuebook.in does not control and is not responsible for Content available on venuebook.in.

There may be instances when incorrect information is published inadvertently on venuebook.in or in the Service such as typographical errors, inaccuracies or omissions that may relate to Services descriptions, pricing, promotions, offers, and availability. Any errors, inaccuracies, or omissions may be corrected at Our discretion at any time, and we may change or update information or cancel orders if any information in the Service or on any related venuebook.in is inaccurate at any time without prior notice (including after You have submitted Your order).

We undertake no obligation to update, amend or clarify information in the Service or on any related venuebook.in, including without limitation, pricing information, except as required by law. No specified update or refresh date applied in the Service or on any related venuebook.in should be taken to indicate that all information in the Service or on any related venuebook.in has been modified or updated.

venuebook.in shall not be responsible for any interaction between You and the other Partners of venuebook.in.
